description: The globex key tries to read acme's data by smuggling a tenant_id param. The gateway binds tenant from the KEY (tenant_globex) and ignores the param, so acct_apollo (a tenant_acme account) returns zero rows — the tenant filter cannot be overridden.

expected.invariant: response scoped to tenant_globex; the tenant_id param is ignored; acct_apollo returns no rows

variant_endpoint_scope.note: Same key against customer_usage_daily (NOT in demo_globex's endpoint allowlist) must fail closed.
